title: anthyllis vulneraria subsp. insularum
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. insularum, also known as kidney vetch, is a subspecies of the kidney vetch plant, a flowering perennial native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce infection. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to improve kidney function, reduce blood pressure, and act as an antioxidant, protecting against cell damage and promoting overall well-being. The plant is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to treat a variety of ailments, including kidney stones and urinary tract infections.
